title: Converting a partitioned table to liquid clustering is generally available ​
body:
**June 12, 2026**

You can now convert an existing partitioned Delta Lake table to liquid clustering with `ALTER TABLE ... REPLACE PARTITIONED BY WITH CLUSTER BY`. Conversion minimizes reader and writer downtime and supports both external and managed tables. This feature is generally available in Databricks Runtime 18.1 and above. See [Convert a partitioned table to liquid clustering](/aws/en/tables/clustering#convert-partitioned).

ref_links.text: Convert a partitioned table to liquid clustering
